items.caption: A low-resolution, night-time surveillance photograph showing a vehicle with a flatbed trailer attached. the vehicle appears to be a minibus or a similar type of van. the photo is taken from a side angle, and the vehicle is partially obscured by the trailer. the background is dark, suggesting the photo was taken in a poorly lit area or at night. there is a timestamp in the upper right corner indicating the date and time of the image, but the text is too small to read clearly. the image has a grainy quality, typical of surveillance cameras.
